# Frontend Page Update Checklist

## Before Editing

- Confirm the route or page entry point.
- Read the adjacent CSS file.
- Check for reused components in the same folder.
- Note any SEO-sensitive text, schema, or navigation links that might be affected.

## During Editing

- Stay compatible with React 17 and React Router v5.
- Prefer local CSS edits over new styling systems.
- Preserve mobile behavior.
- Add or preserve meaningful alt text for new or changed images.

## Before Finishing

- Verify the route still renders correctly.
- Check whether navigation labels or links also need updates.
- Mention if sitemap, redirects, or other public metadata may need follow-up.
- Prefer a frontend build when the change touches layout, routing, or imports.
